cards.back: A statistical language model that predicts the next word in a sentence based on the previous n words
A model for language modeling that uses a set of n-grams to represent the structure of a language
A linguistic theory that proposes to model the structure of a language using a set of hierarchical units
A n-gram model that predicts the next word in a sentence based on the previous word
A n-gram model that predicts the next word in a sentence based on the previous word, with no consideration for the context
